title: NOEL :: Behance

bodyText: PULAR PARA O CONTEÚDO PRINCIPAL PULAR PARA O RODAPÉ Acesse behance.net Explorar Carreiras Recursos Contratar Experimente grátis Fazer logon Acesse adobe.com Seguir Contratar Ferramentas Salvar Compartilhar Curtir NOEL Anna Gordeychuk • Seguir NOEL is a brand of minimalist hair jewelry (tiaras). The identity base is a simple and clean form that refers to the shape of the tiara. A thin, elegant graphic element paired with a bold sans-serif font conveys the brand's uniqueness — a classic accessory for modern women. Credits Graphic Design: Anna Gordeychuk Photo: Sasha Komandrovskaya © 2022​​​​​​​ The main visual element on the minimalist packaging is the personal message (Your Tiara Inside). The brand speaks directly to the buyer, emphasizing its attentive and careful attitude towards him. Sometimes tiara form acts as an active branding element, and sometimes branding is less evident (for example, we hint at the shape of the tiara with the curved edge of the tag or the rounded corners of business cards). The main channel of brand communication with customers is Instagram. Here, the minimalistic identity has developed in numerous templates for posts and stories. All templates are simple yet allow the team to serve various content types in NOEL social networks. Thanks for watching!
